events.title: Lionel Richie turns 77
events.blurb: American singer-songwriter Lionel Richie, known for hits like 'All Night Long' and 'Hello', was born on June 20, 1949.

angles.name: Celebrate Lionel Richie
angles.copy: From Commodores classics to solo smash hits, Lionel Richie has been soundtracking our lives for decades. Wishing a very happy 77th birthday to the legend!

events.title: Cyndi Lauper turns 73
events.blurb: American singer, songwriter, and actress Cyndi Lauper, famous for 'Girls Just Want to Have Fun' and 'Time After Time', was born on June 22, 1953.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Cyndi Lauper
angles.copy: She's so unusual, and we absolutely love her for it! Happy 73rd birthday to the incredible Cyndi Lauper. What's your favourite Cyndi track?

events.title: George Michael would have been 63
events.blurb: British singer-songwriter George Michael, of Wham! and a hugely successful solo career, was born on June 25, 1963.

angles.name: Tribute to George Michael
angles.copy: Remembering the incredible talent of George Michael, who would have turned 63 today. His music continues to inspire and move us all.

events.title: Anniversary of Michael Jackson's death
events.blurb: The 'King of Pop', Michael Jackson, passed away on June 25, 2009, at the age of 50.

angles.name: Remembering Michael Jackson
angles.copy: 17 years since we lost the King of Pop. Michael Jackson's music and artistry continue to transcend generations. What's your favourite MJ track?

events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: English musician, singer, songwriter, and actor Ringo Starr, best known as the drummer for The Beatles, was born on July 7, 1940.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Ringo Starr
angles.copy: Peace and love! Sending huge birthday wishes to the legendary Ringo Starr, who turns 86 today. What's your favourite Beatles drum moment?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: English musician, singer, songwriter, and astrophysicist Brian May, lead guitarist of the rock band Queen, was born on July 19, 1947.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Brian May
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to the iconic Queen guitarist, Brian May! His riffs are legendary and his solos unforgettable.

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: English singer, songwriter, and actor Sir Mick Jagger, lead vocalist of The Rolling Stones, was born on July 26, 1943.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Mick Jagger
angles.copy: Still got the moves like Jagger at 83! Happy birthday to the legendary Rolling Stones frontman, Sir Mick Jagger. What's your favourite Stones anthem?

events.title: Anniversary of MTV's launch
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its very first music video.

angles.name: MTV's Birthday
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV launched and changed music forever. The first video? The ironically titled 'Video Killed The Radio Star' by The Buggles.

events.title: Anniversary of Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' release
events.blurb: Oasis released their iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: It's been 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the sound of British rock. What's your favourite track from this absolute classic?

events.title: Anniversary of the Woodstock Festival
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal event in music history, took place from August 15-18, 1969.

angles.name: Woodstock Anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years ago, half a million people gathered for '3 Days of Peace & Music' at Woodstock. A truly iconic moment in history. Which legendary performance do you wish you'd seen?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death
events.blurb: The 'King of Rock and Roll', Elvis Presley, passed away on August 16, 1977.

angles.name: Remembering Elvis
angles.copy: Remembering the King, Elvis Presley, 49 years after his passing. His music and legacy continue to shake up the world.

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's death
events.blurb: Influential American rapper Tupac Shakur was tragically shot and killed in Las Vegas on September 7, 1996, and died on September 13, 1996.

angles.name: Tupac Tribute
angles.copy: Remembering the profound impact and enduring legacy of Tupac Shakur, 30 years after his tragic passing. His words still resonate.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's death
events.blurb: Legendary American guitarist Jimi Hendrix passed away on September 18, 1970.

angles.name: Jimi Hendrix Tribute
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled genius of Jimi Hendrix, 56 years since we lost a true guitar icon. His music continues to inspire generations.

events.title: Anniversary of The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' release
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album 'Abbey Road' in the UK on September 26, 1969.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That iconic cover and even more iconic tracks. What's your album highlight?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: American singer-songwriter Chrissie Hynde, frontwoman of The Pretenders, was born on September 7, 1951.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Chrissie Hynde
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon whose voice and attitude continue to captivate.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: English singer-songwriter Liam Gallagher, former frontman of Oasis and Beady Eye, was born on September 21, 1972.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Liam Gallagher
angles.copy: Rock 'n' Roll Star and a true legend! Happy 54th birthday to Liam Gallagher. What's your favourite Liam moment?

events.title: Anniversary of John Lennon's 'Imagine' release
events.blurb: John Lennon released his iconic song 'Imagine' on September 9, 1971, in the US and October 24, 1971, in the UK. The album 'Imagine' was released on September 9, 1971.

angles.name: Imagine Anniversary
angles.copy: 55 years since John Lennon gave us 'Imagine'. A timeless message of peace and hope that still resonates today.

events.title: Anniversary of the first iPod release
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first iPod on October 23, 2001, and it became available for purchase on November 10, 2001.

angles.name: iPod Anniversary
angles.copy: 25 years ago, Apple introduced the first iPod. 1,000 songs in your pocket changed everything. What was on your first iPod?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: James Bond Day is celebrated annually on October 5th, marking the anniversary of the world premiere of the first James Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Happy James Bond Day
angles.copy: Shaken, not stirred! Happy James Bond Day to all 007 fans. What's your favourite Bond film or theme song?
